Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9AB3 "JAHANGIRKHANWORLDCHAMPIONSHIPSQUASH-9AB3" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Jahangir Khan World Championship Squash.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
